recommendations.level3: Deepen your knowledge of {{skill}} with advanced cases. Consider certifications and challenging projects.

recommendations.level5: Excellent mastery of {{skill}}! Share knowledge and stay updated with releases.

sidebar.title: Salesforce Skill Shine
sidebar.subtitle: Organizing professional positioning, skills, and evolution in a clean and objective experience.

home.badge: Your GPS in the Salesforce Ecosystem
home.title: Navigate <1>Salesforce careers</1> with clarity.
home.subtitle: A platform designed to assess your competencies, identify gaps, and outline the best evolution path for Admin, Developer, Architect, and Consultant roles.
home.careersDesc: Discover which role in the Salesforce ecosystem best aligns with your goals and start mapping your skills.
home.journeyDesc: A continuous methodology so you don't stagnate. It works like the development lifecycle: plan, map, validate, and reach new levels.

mapping.title: 1. Mapping
mapping.desc: Assess your current skills against the expected market standard for each role.

gaps.title: 2. Identifying Gaps
gaps.desc: Discover exactly what knowledge you lack to reach your next level.

plan.title: 3. Evolution Plan
plan.desc: Create a roadmap directing your studies to the most critical and impactful competencies.

achievement.title: 4. Achievement
achievement.desc: Achieve certifications, execute projects, and consolidate your career in the ecosystem.

home.pyramidTitle: Your career is not a sprint, it's a <1>pyramid of value.</1>
home.pyramidDesc: Just like the path to Technical Architect in the ecosystem, Salesforce Skill Shine helps you build a solid foundation, acquire specializations, and finally reach the top of your professional journey.

about.title: Helsio Mattia
about.role: Salesforce Consultant | CRM Specialist | Sales & Service Cloud | 4x Certified
about.bio1: Salesforce professional with over 4 years of experience in designing and optimizing CRM solutions, focusing on business scalability and performance.
about.bio2: Currently works at <1>Efí Bank</1>, leading initiatives to improve support operations, automation flows, and CRM efficiency with Sales and Service Cloud.
about.bio3: Combines technical and business vision, supported by a previous background in ERP consulting and QA, which strengthens end-to-end understanding of corporate processes.

efi.desc: Management and optimization of the Salesforce platform, aligning CRM with business processes and needs. Works on customizations, problem-solving, technical documentation, user support, and performance, scalability, and automation initiatives.

eqi.desc: Worked on the evolution of the Salesforce platform focusing on objects, fields, layouts, automations, documentation, support, and translating requirements into practical solutions.

cloud11.desc: During an international experience in Egypt, started his trajectory in Salesforce, collaborating with teams from different regions to adapt the platform to local needs.

controlsoft.desc: Worked with planning, execution, and reporting of tests in agribusiness ERP, focusing on quality, reliability, and critical data validation.

proxsis.desc: Led ERP implementation in industries, mapping processes, providing support, training teams, and documenting solutions to optimize operational efficiency.

contactPage.title: Contact me and <1>Evolve</1>
contactPage.subtitle: Do you have questions about your career, need a detailed evaluation, or are seeking personalized strategic direction? I'm here to help you shine in the Salesforce ecosystem.
contactPage.servicesSubtitle: I offer a structured approach to transforming your Salesforce career through two main pillars.

assessment.title: Competency Assessment
assessment.desc: A deep diagnosis of your hard and soft skills within the Salesforce ecosystem, identifying exactly where you are and what you need to level up.

mentoring.title: Career Direction – Mapping Session
mentoring.desc: A session focused on outlining a personalized strategic roadmap. Receive clear guidance on next steps, certifications, and positioning, without a commitment to guaranteed results – the protagonism is yours.
mentoring.f1: Targeted study roadmap (no mandatory fixed schedule)
mentoring.f2: Recommendations for certifications based on your current moment
mentoring.f3: Positioning and LinkedIn review (suggestions applicable by you)
mentoring.disclaimer: * This service offers technical and strategic direction. Approval for certifications, promotions, or job changes depends exclusively on your preparation and factors external to the consultancy.

contactPage.ctaTitle: Ready to take the next step in your Salesforce journey?
contactPage.ctaSubtitle: Choose the best channel for us to talk and start your evolution.
contactPage.disclaimer: ⚠️ Career assessment and direction services offer analysis and recommendations based on my professional experience. Results such as approval for certifications, promotions, or salary increases depend on external factors and individual application by the client. There is no guarantee of specific results.

comingSoon.title: Coming Soon
comingSoon.desc: Knowledge and tool recommendations are being mapped for this career.

finish.desc: Fill in your details to generate the final report of your competency assessment. This information will be used in your PDF header.
